modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to log into ExamSoft with Admin/Faculty account

full_description_text:  
I’m having a bit of trouble signing into ExamSoft using my Admin/Faculty account. It’s just not letting me in, and I’ve tried a couple of times now. I’m not sure if it’s a glitch or something else, but I really need access for my nursing classes. It’s super frustrating because I thought everything was set up correctly!
